name: Trusted-Dex Demo
author: PermsTest
description: Demo trusted-Dex plugin with a tiny plugin-local .dex payload for exercising review, trust, SHA-256, and explicit-tap dispatch.
comments: This demo does not launch APK components or run in the background. It only runs through the trusted_dex runtime after all policy checks pass and the user taps the action.

actions.title: Run Trusted String Demo
actions.description: Load the reviewed .dex payload and call public static String run().
